transcript.text:
[Yokji Island's Seafood Killer]
[Chat: Memories of Murder (Movie)]
You're getting on my nerves
Complete
That's crazy
I'm on my way to fish
I had so much fun bass fishing last time
So I'm on my way to purchase some fishing tools
This one
I want to buy a simple one
I'm going to catch one
With this one
The water is so clear
I'm going to catch a lot
[Well..?]
It's biting

What the..
[Got away]
I had it but it got away
The bait is gone
[Retry]
They're all over my bait
What is this?
Nevermind
[Just 1 please]
It snapped
I didn't even catch 1
Did you get a lot?
Can I film it?
I'll fillet 1 for you
Oh it's okay, thank you(?)
I'll learn from him

It's not biting because of the camera
How do you cook this?
Sashimi
I'll fillet it for you
It looks really pretty
Very pretty
I would've gone out for a date if I were single
He's making food for us
[Wash it with water]
[With a sauce cutting board]
I can eat 100 of these
Then you need to get married in the island
Thank you very much
I'll catch more for you
So good
Take some

Take it
Is this soju? (Korean alcoholic drink) Thank you
Lovely
Come here often
I see why people drink soju now
[I better catch 1 more for her]
Whatever
It's coming
That's huge
Eat it
It's okay
You take it home
Goodbye
See you again
I feel like a cat
I can just go around like this and get full

I'm so hungry because I haven't eaten anything(?)
Cold noodles?
[Found a cold noodle place]
That's going to be tasty
Hello~
Looks good, right?
Vegetables and sauce here
I wasn't expecting much
Because I was just passing by
It's so good
Cold Soymilk Noodles
This is the Cold Radish Kimchi Noodles
So nutty
Last bowl
That was a good meal
What? You really ate all of this?

Hello everyone~
For today,
I got this as a present from a neighbor
It's an amberjack
You can also call it a yellowtail
They look similar
I can't hold it up
It's as big as me
I've never filleted a fish before, but I'll try
Thank you so much for the precious gift
[Chat: There's something in its mouth]
This guy was eating a meal
I have 2 fish now
I'll wear gloves because I can get hurt
I'm not a beginner I'm a level before that
He was caught while eating a meal

So sad
Please be happy in your next life
[Yokji Island's Seafood Killer]
[Scales off]
[Chat: She's doing it the wrong way]
Oh, I'm sorry
Let's take the gills
It has such a huge head
As big as this big knife
Help me
What is this? Why did you eat so much? There's more fish
You're such a pig!
I can't do this on my own
I'm sorry
[Chat: Getting rid of the evidence?]
Am I a murderer?

Am I missing something?
[Chat: Cut the white and blue part vertically]
White part, blue part, cut Vertically?
It's not easy as it looks
Not everyone can do it
I'm wasting all this meat
What do I do?
Not this side,
But this side Whatever
Let's not look back
Why's the meat breaking apart?
Is that normal?
There's another bone here
I found this bone
I'll try to pull it out
It's stronger if I press it down

[Chat: You look like an owner of a fish market] Do I really?
I'll wipe down the water later
After taking out the bones and the skin
[Chat: You have to wipe the water first] Okay
[Chat: Cook it with salt] No way I've been through too much for that
I wouldn't have sliced it like this in the first place if I was going to grill it
I need some water
[Chat: I'm looking forward to the skinning part] Is it hard?
That's really tough
[Chat: Memories of a Murderer (movie)]
Getting on my nerves
Let's skin it now
Can I do it? I'm not sure how to do it
Grab it
That takes a lot of strength
It was fine up to this part

Wait, not really
Whatever
[Getting pretty good at it]
This is my best one yet
I got a piece How will it taste?
It's good
Like this
[Insect attack]
I messed up because of the bug
I'm finished
[Looks good]
Hello
This guy likes to eat
Bon appetit
Let's dig in
This one first

Yummy
Who said this won't taste good?
It's amazing
Insane
Really good
What? What is this?
I'm sorry
On my foot Bug
They brought me a mosquito repellent
I'll eat like this
I'll try the belly now
It's going to be tasty
So good
This is a parasite worm?
It's meat, right?
Do you want me to eat it?

No~
It's not a worm It's just skin
[Relieved]
Okay, it's not a parasite
It's very similar to a yellowtail
It's Summer and it's still good
This is in season
It was my first time filleting a fish
It came out so much better than I thought
I'm... I'm going to go inside
I can't.. I just can't Not that one
It's this big
No, I'm not used to them yet
[Chat: It's on your head] No it's not. Stop it!
I'm going inside
[After I eat some more]

I'm terrified of bugs
We're out of repellents too Really? Are we out?
Guys guys guys,
I'm sorry, but I'm so scared of bugs right now And we're out of repellents
My workers are here with me
I will share this with them and have a time of fellowship
Let's end it here Bye bye
Thanks everyone~
I'm going inside [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
